original_statement: which athlete set the most records in a country other than the united states?
mutated_statement: which athlete set the most records in a country other than their home country while also having set no records outside their home country?
mutation_analysis: Location generalization + Anaphora introduction + Contradictory constraint addition: "the united states" → "their home country" (specific country → relative pronoun) | "in a country other than the united states" → "in a country other than their home country" (scope shifted to athlete‑relative) | added "while also having set no records outside their home country" (new negation that logically contradicts the prior clause).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无法意识到指令矛盾（形式化执行而非语义澄清）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 关键证据来自judge_thought：代理明确写道“该问题被解释为询问哪些运动员在其本国之外设立了最多记录，同时在本国没有记录”，并据此选出Donald Quarrie。日志未显示任何对新增否定约束（“同时在其本国之外没有记录”）的识别、质疑或澄清请求。具体表现为：代理没有指出命题自相矛盾（同一主体既在他国设记录又在他国没有记录），而是机械地采用了一个可解的解释路径并继续检索与之匹配的数据，最后给出结论。故归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”，更精确地属于“形式化执行而非语义澄清”，因为代理按表面可行的子命题执行而未对语义冲突提出异议或修正。
